# `jobs` tools

## `jobs.cancel`

`implemented`

Cancel a Job cooperatively; error envelope if already terminal. Requires operator.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `job_id` | `string` | yes | The Job to cancel. |

## `jobs.get`

`implemented` · `read-only`

Render a Job by ID. Requires viewer.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `job_id` | `string` | yes | The Job to render. |

## `jobs.list`

`implemented` · `read-only`

List the newest Jobs visible to the caller's readable projects. Requires viewer.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `limit` | `integer` | no | Maximum rows returned (capped at 200). |

## `jobs.wait`

`implemented` · `read-only`

Poll a Job until terminal or the timeout elapses. Requires viewer.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `job_id` | `string` | yes | The Job to poll until terminal. |
| `timeout_s` | `number` | no | Maximum seconds to wait (capped at 300). |
